name: assegaiphp/events
description: A lightweight event emitter package for AssegaiPHP and standalone PHP applications.

suggest.assegaiphp/core: Adds the Assegai module bridge so event listeners can be auto-registered from providers.
suggest.assegaiphp/orm: Adds the ORM-backed outbox store and event_outbox bridge for durable event recording.
suggest.assegaiphp/rabbitmq: Provides a ready-made durable queue target for relayed outbox messages.
